description: The useQuery calls for conversations, conversationMessages, and commuteData do NOT have onError handlers. If these queries fail silently, the user sees a loading state forever. Add onError handlers that log the error and optionally show a toast.
successCriteria: All useQuery calls in AIAssistant.tsx have onError handlers
Errors are logged to console with structured context
User sees a clear error state in the UI (already partially handled, but ensure consistency)
